title: Ivy's Silly Sneeze Magic
synopsis: When little Ivy catches a magical cold, her sneezes start creating silly objects that bounce and wiggle all around her house, leading to hilarious chaos and unexpected fun.

pages.text: Ivy woke up with a tickly nose. "Ah... ah... ACHOO!" she sneezed. POOF! A bouncy purple banana appeared on her bed!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sits up in bed with an enormous surprised expression, eyes wide as saucers, mouth forming a perfect 'O'. A ridiculously oversized purple banana bounces comically on her polka-dot bedspread with exaggerated wobble lines around it.
illustration.alt: Ivy looking shocked at a purple banana that appeared from her sneeze

pages.text: "That's weird!" giggled Ivy. She picked up the squishy banana. It felt like jelly and smelled like strawberries. "Ah... ah... ACHOO!" Another sneeze!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes holds the wobbly purple banana with both hands, her face scrunched up in pre-sneeze expression with one eye squeezed shut. The banana stretches and squashes like rubber in her grip with cartoon motion lines everywhere.
illustration.alt: Ivy holding a wobbly purple banana while preparing to sneeze again

pages.text: BOING! A giant green shoe with tiny wings fluttered around her room! "This is the silliest cold ever!" Ivy laughed as the shoe did loop-de-loops.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes points up at a comically oversized lime green sneaker with rainbow butterfly wings that's doing aerial acrobatics. Her expression is pure delight with an enormous grin and sparkly eyes. The winged shoe leaves a trail of glittery swooshes.
illustration.alt: Ivy watching a giant winged shoe flying around her bedroom

pages.text: Ivy ran to the kitchen. "Mom! My sneezes make funny things!" But before Mom could answer... "ACHOO!" A wiggly orange chair danced across the floor!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes tugs on her mother's apron with exaggerated pulling motion. A bright orange armchair with cartoon legs does the can-can dance behind them, kicking its cushiony legs high with musical notes floating around it.
illustration.alt: Ivy telling her mom about magic sneezes while an orange chair dances

pages.text: "Achoo! Achoo! ACHOO!" Ivy couldn't stop! A blue singing spoon! A red hat that meowed! A yellow cup that hopped like a bunny! The kitchen was full of silly magic!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes stands in the center with her head tilted back mid-sneeze, surrounded by a chaotic parade of magical objects: a bright blue spoon with a tiny mouth singing opera, a crimson red hat with whiskers going 'meow', and a sunshine yellow teacup bouncing with bunny ears and cotton tail.
illustration.alt: Ivy surrounded by magical singing, meowing, and hopping objects from her sneezes

pages.text: Soon the whole house was filled with Ivy's sneeze-magic! Everything was giggling, dancing, and being wonderfully weird. Even Mom started laughing!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes dances in the middle of a house party thrown by all her magical sneeze-objects. The purple banana, winged shoe, orange chair, singing spoon, meowing hat, and hopping cup all celebrate together with streamers and confetti in candy-bright colors.
illustration.alt: Ivy dancing with all her magical sneeze-created objects in a house party

pages.text: When Ivy's nose finally stopped tickling, all the magic things gave her gentle hugs goodbye and disappeared with happy *pops*! "That was the BEST cold ever!" Ivy grinned.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sits cross-legged with the biggest, most satisfied smile, surrounded by her magical friends giving group hugs with tiny heart bubbles floating around. Each object glows softly as they fade away with sparkly 'pop' effects and rainbow trails.
illustration.alt: Ivy getting goodbye hugs from her magical objects as they disappear with sparkles

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: What happened when Ivy sneezed?
questions.explanation: Every time Ivy sneezed, silly magical objects would appear like the purple banana and winged shoe!

questions.question: What color was the dancing chair?
questions.explanation: The wiggly chair that danced across the kitchen floor was orange!

questions.question: What sound did the red hat make?
questions.explanation: The red hat was silly because it meowed like a cat instead of being quiet like normal hats!

questions.question: How did the story end?
choices: The magic things hugged Ivy goodbye
questions.explanation: All the magical objects gave Ivy gentle goodbye hugs before disappearing with happy pops!
